---
title: "HW2"
author: "Sukhman Parhar"
date: "2026-03-11"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set

library(tidyverse)
library(ISLR)
library(glmnet)
library(caret)
library(tidymodels)
library(corrplot)
library(ggplot2)
library(plotmo)
library(ggrepel)
library(pls)
```

## load and clean the data

```{r}
# Load in the data 
college <- read_csv("College.csv")

# look at the data
#str(college)
#dim(college)
#summary(college)
#colSums(is.na(college))

# clean the data

# remove college var
college$College <- NULL

# cap grad rate at 100% anything above is impossible
college <- college[college$Grad.Rate <= 100, ]
```

##
